microsoft_ft: Deployed and operationalized an internal **AI Revenue Agent** for drill planning, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% through LLM-powered workflow automation and prompt-tuned routing logic.

Led 0→1 build of a Resilience Automation Platform, defining self-service scheduling requirements and reusable implementation patterns that cut operational toil by 30% and scaled deployment across enterprise customers including **Databricks, SAP, and Walmart**.

Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation to a platformized system, standardizing GTM-aligned workflows to sustain **45+ annual drills** and drive $14M+ in measurable business impact.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, acting as field liaison between Engineering and enterprise stakeholders—including a sovereign-cloud isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ contract**.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level pilot in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** by mapping complex technical workflows into clear, executable deployment plans.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows, conducting user demos and enablement sessions that drove utilization across 14 teams and saved 37 engineering hours monthly—mirroring FDE-style customer readiness and change management.

Influenced the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ discovery interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, translating complex business processes into an intent-based YAML generation capability.

Accelerated semantic search deployment by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **LLM-powered retrieval tool**, cutting lookup time by 83% and establishing a reusable integration pattern.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across **140+ teams** on a unified automation prioritization framework, launching regions 28% faster and generating $3M in accelerated revenue through a structured, pilot-to-rollout deployment model.

Conducted GTM workflow discovery with 20+ service teams, surfacing **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch and building a roadmap to automate critical execution paths—directly analogous to AI agent embedding in sales processes.

Built a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-impact initiatives, and monitor deployment outcomes in real time.
amazon_robotics: Defined the legacy OS migration strategy and mapped dependencies across 1,200+ stations, achieving **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition using an iterative, MVP-first deployment model.

Drove alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing repeatable rollout collateral for future releases.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across a cross-functional implementation team.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by deploying a new CRM process to manage end-to-end scoping and invoicing for 200+ monthly proposals, directly optimizing a core GTM sales workflow.
Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and CRM-driven lead routing.
Improved leadership pricing models by analyzing **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, translating complex financial data into a clear, executable remediation roadmap.
